name: Under Armour, Inc.

profile.description: Under Armour designs performance athletic apparel, footwear, and accessories. Revenue declining 0.8% YoY with -10.0% profit margin and -30.0% ROE. Forward P/E of 22.9 at $5.56 stock price. 6,200 employees.

innovation.label: WEAK
innovation.analysis: Track Record (1/3): Revenue declining with negative margins — the turnaround under founder Kevin Plank has not yet materialized [1]. AI Deployment (0/2): No AI. Market Share (0/2): Losing share to Nike, Adidas, and emerging brands. Product Pipeline (1/2): DTC focus, product refresh. R&D Intensity (1/1): Performance technology R&D.

inspiration.label: DEVELOPING
inspiration.analysis: Mission Floor (3/4): 'Make all athletes better' — genuine and purpose-driven. Community Impact (0/2): No programs. Employee Retention (1/2): 6,200 employees. Insider Buying (0/2): No data.

ai_resilience.label: MODERATE
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (7/9): Apparel manufacturing and retail are physical businesses largely protected from AI disruption [1]. AI Opportunity (0/1): No AI revenue.

infinite_game.summary: Under Armour is in turnaround mode with founder Plank's return, focused on survival and brand recovery.

just_cause.analysis: Just Cause (2/3): 'Make all athletes better' is genuine and has guided the brand since founding [1].

trusting_teams.analysis: Trusting Teams (0/2): CEO changes, layoffs, declining culture metrics.

worthy_rivals.analysis: Worthy Rivals (0/1): Competitive focus on Nike is finite.

existential_flexibility.analysis: Existential Flexibility (0/2): Same apparel model with declining execution.

courage_to_lead.analysis: Courage to Lead (0/2): Founder return is a reset, not courage.

investment_thesis: Under Armour's founder return and DTC focus could drive brand recovery if product innovation resonates [1].
thesis_continued: Revenue declining, -10% profit margin, -30% ROE, and Forward P/E of 22.9 on negative earnings suggest the turnaround is not yet working [2]. Market share losses to Nike/Adidas continue.
key_risks: Continued market share loss to Nike, Adidas, and emerging brands [1]
Brand relevance erosion in competitive athletic apparel market
sources: Under Armour Financial Results — SEC Filings, 2026
Yahoo Finance — UAA Key Statistics, accessed June 2026
